query: SELECT logDate FROM daily_logs WHERE userId = 1 AND logDate >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) ORDER BY logDate DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute SELECT logDate FROM daily_logs WHERE userId = 1 AND logDate >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) ORDER BY logDate DESC;
